differences: The previous browser screenshot showed lane cards competing visually with the trace table.
The controls column stayed fully expanded, which reduced the trace reading area.
The trace table exposed too many columns at once for fast scanning.
suggestions: Turn lane cards into compact selectors and move detailed lane activity into a dedicated focus card.
Collapse operator forms by default so the right rail stays quieter during trace reading.
Reduce the trace table to time, event, and preview while keeping tool and step as small tags.
reasoning: This iteration applies the readability fixes from the initial screenshot, but a fresh post-change screenshot is still needed before treating the visual pass as complete.
next_actions: Reload the operator console after restarting the running coordinator process.
Capture a new screenshot and re-run visual QA if more cleanup is needed.
